dataset: OpenCAD (Grand Theft Auto V game data)
case_id: Marcus Vance DOB: 1980-05-12 / Warrant ID: dynamically created

pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 13 creates civilian with name='Marcus Vance' in ncic_names table; task.json description references same name
setup_task.sh lines 24, 31 create warrant with reason='Failure to Appear' in warrants table; task.json description references same warrant reason
setup_opencad.sh line 218 inserts user with email='admin@opencad.local' into users table; line 360 confirms login credentials; oc-config.php line 113 defines CAD_TO_EMAIL='admin@opencad.local'
setup_opencad.sh line 216 creates password_hash('Admin123!') and inserts into users table; line 360 confirms login credentials

privileged_info_summary: Task targets a synthetic civilian record named Marcus Vance (DOB: 1980-05-12) in an OpenCAD system. The system uses Grand Theft Auto V game data as seed data and creates task-specific synthetic records. Admin login credentials are admin@opencad.local / Admin123!. All four metadata claims have been independently verified through code execution path analysis: the setup scripts create these exact values in the database before task execution.
